name: superpowers-ml
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows — plus a conservative ML-research layer. Fork of obra/superpowers.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, delivery, and ML-research workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Superpowers ML to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows — plus ML-research extensions: experiment design, a cheap-to-expensive verification ladder (rungs R0-R7), and sober result review.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for an ML experiment I'd like to run.
Let's add a feature to this project.
